title: Supreme Court allows Bombay HC to proceed with contempt case against lawyer for allegations against Justice Revati Mohite Dere
description: The Supreme Court on Monday upheld the decision of the Bombay High Court to proceed with criminal contempt of court against a petition for attributing political motives to Justice Revati Mohite Dere in a petition concerning the death of Disha Salian [Nilesh C Ojha vs. High Court of Bombay]. The Bench of Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep Mehta emphasised that judicial independence is a "non-derogable feature" of the Constitution and observed that inte
